stemHtml: Which one of the following statements includes some of the 8 core competencies of a pilot according to ICAO?

options.a: Communication, CRM, application of procedures, situation awareness.
options.b: Communication, CRM, leadership & teamwork, operational procedure, interpersonal relationships.
options.c: Communication, leadership & teamwork, application of procedures, situation awareness.
options.d: Communication, leadership & teamwork, application of procedures, technical knowledge.
